name: Steve Betterton
bio: Steve Betterton serves as the Mayor of Bullard, a small but growing community in southern Smith County. Bullard is known for its family-friendly atmosphere and proximity to Tyler. The mayor works with the city council to guide development and maintain the city's rural charm.
campaignPromises: Support Bullard ISD and community programs
Maintain low tax rates for residents
Enhance city parks and recreational facilities
